research_question: Find non-dilutive R&D funding for an industrial 3D printing materials small business specializing in rugged photopolymer resins.

company_profile.name: polySpectra
company_profile.description: A U.S. small business making COR (cyclic olefin resin) rugged photopolymer resins for industrial DLP/LCD 3D printing. We sell to engineers in industrial, manufacturing, and laboratory facilities for end-use parts that need durability, heat resistance, and chemical resistance.
constraints: prefer programs without matching-fund requirements when feasible
conservative on eligibility — only surface programs we can credibly win
exclude grants already in the known_grants list
